name: chat2kb
description: Convert chat conversations into structured Markdown knowledge-base files. Use when the user wants to save, capture, export, or document a conversation.
author: Bagel
releaseNotes: v0.0.4 - Fix code block visibility: remove text language hint from all example blocks so they render with proper contrast on ClawHub; v0.0.3 added MIT license; v0.0.2 declared required bins, env vars, and config path in metadata.
